summary: Verified Task 2 (App Download promo pill is now dynamic from /api/promos/banner). Task 1 (Admin Send-Quote required affiliate cost) verified via static code review only — live UI verification blocked at admin 2FA (email-code gate), per review-request instructions this is flagged as 'requires manual verification' rather than a bug.

evidence.notes: Pill renders the DB code 'WELCOME' (NOT the old hardcoded 'WELCOME20'). Discount label matches percent value from API. Pill correctly hidden if promo is null (guarded by {promo && ...} render). Verified on both /download and /app routes.

task_1_send_quote_affiliate_cost_require.reason: Admin login is 2FA-gated. Reached the 'Enter 6-digit code' screen (code emailed to support@turanelitelimo.com). No inbox access from the test environment.

code_review_findings.label_red_asterisk: PRESENT — QuoteRequestsTab.jsx:914 renders '*' plus '(internal · required for profit-based Google Ads)' helper copy
code_review_findings.tooltip_when_disabled: PRESENT — line 1137-1141 title='Enter affiliate cost first — required for profit-based Google Ads bidding' (wording slightly differs from request spec but conveys same intent)
code_review_findings.send_toast_when_empty: PRESENT — line 650-652: toast.error('Enter the affiliate cost — required so Google Ads bids on real profit.') — exact string match
code_review_findings.send_toast_when_cost_gte_price: PRESENT — line 654-657: toast.error("Affiliate cost is ≥ retail price — that's a loss. Double-check before sending.") — exact string match
code_review_findings.double_guard: send() function validates BEFORE calling _submit — even a force-click cannot bypass validation because button-disable is UI-only but send() is the source of truth

action_items: MANUAL: Main agent / human with inbox access to support@turanelitelimo.com should log in and walk through the Send-Quote dialog to visually confirm the red asterisk, disabled state, tooltip on hover, and the two toast messages. Code review confirms implementation is correct.

OPTIONAL: The disabled-button tooltip wording is 'Enter affiliate cost first — required for profit-based Google Ads bidding' — request asked for 'tooltip about affiliate cost being required'. Current wording satisfies intent; no action required.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteRequestsTab.jsx is 2616 lines — exceeds the 700-line file-size guideline. Recommend splitting SendQuoteDialog, SuggestAffiliatesDialog, and helper math (estimateQuote/computeMargin/marginBand) into separate modules for maintainability. NOT blocking this iteration.

AppDownload.jsx promo useEffect swallows errors silently (try/catch with empty catch) — acceptable here because pill is optional and hidden on failure, but consider logging to a client error tracker if one exists.

success_rate.frontend: Task 2: 100% | Task 1: code-review only (2FA blocked live test)

test_credentials: support@turanelitelimo.com / TuronAdmin@2025 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — reached 2FA prompt as expected
